_meta.author: ruixen.ui
_meta.title: Date Time Input
_meta.description: The DateTimeInput component provides a simple and intuitive way to select both a date and a time within a single interface. Built entirely with shadcn/ui primitives, it combines a popover calendar for picking dates with a sleek time input field, ensuring consistency and accessibility across applications. Its minimal yet functional design makes it easy to integrate into forms, booking systems, scheduling tools, or any feature that requires precise date and time selection. With a live preview of the chosen values, DateTimeInput enhances usability while maintaining a clean, modern UI.
